title: R-diagnose: Map every reader site of externalFixturePath and EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH
description: Read-only diagnosis: enumerate every site that reads `externalFixturePath` (config field) or `EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH` (env var). Confirm the schema definition lives at `packages/shared/src/schemas/fabric-config.ts:50` and identify all consumers in CLI source + tests. Output a brief diagnosis note (in plan summary or inline comments on TASK-004) listing exact file:line references so TASK-004's deletion is mechanical and complete. Initial grep shows: schema at fabric-config.ts:50, three test fixtures (fabric-config.test.ts:106-115, schemas-roundtrip.test.ts:50, zod-roundtrip.test.ts:47), and i18n descriptions referencing EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH in 7-8 keys. NOTE: i18n descriptions reference the env var name (which we keep), so they remain unchanged.
implementation: Run `grep -rn 'externalFixturePath' packages/ --include='*.ts'` to enumerate all source + test occurrences (excluding dist/, coverage/)
Run `grep -rn 'EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH' packages/ --include='*.ts'` to confirm env-var-only consumers (this var stays — we are NOT removing it)
Read fabric-config.ts:50 to confirm schema field definition and any default/optional shape
Read resolver.ts top-to-bottom to confirm whether resolveClients reads externalFixturePath (initial scan suggests it does NOT — confirm)
Compile full deletion checklist: schema entry + test fixtures (3 files) + any production reader (likely zero)

reference.examples: Like rc.12 hard-rename of knowledgeLanguageSchema — no preprocess alias, no migration shim

criteria: Diagnosis output (inline plan note or sub-bullet on TASK-004) lists EVERY file:line reading `externalFixturePath` (config field) — expected ≤5 sites total
Confirmed delta: env var `EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH` is preserved (i18n descriptions referencing it remain unchanged)
Verify command: `grep -rn 'externalFixturePath' packages/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v dist | grep -v coverage` returns the same site list as the diagnosis
Behavioral expectation: TASK-004 implementer can delete the field by following the diagnosis checklist with no detective work

rationale.chosen_approach: Quick read-only diagnosis isolates the deletion blast radius before touching production code
alternatives_considered: Skip diagnosis and let TASK-004 grep on its own
Combine diagnosis + deletion as one task
decision_factors: Schema removal is a breaking change — knowing every reader avoids surprise test failures
rationale.tradeoffs: Two tasks for what could be one — but the audit artifact protects against missed reader sites

manual_checks: Verify diagnosis output enumerates schema, 3 test files, and any code readers
Confirm `EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH` env var consumers are explicitly listed as out-of-scope (preserved)
success_metrics: 100% of source + test references to `externalFixturePath` mapped
Zero false negatives in TASK-004 deletion (verified retroactively via post-delete grep)
